reviews.author: Neeraj singh
reviews.review_body: Its very good school and best performance with good quality of education.

reviews.author: shalu chaudhary
reviews.review_body: We wanted to extend our heartfelt gratitude for your exceptional dedication as our child’s class teacher and for organizing a memorable graduation program. We are happy for our child’s growth and development under your guidance. Thank you for your unwavering support and for creating a nurturing learning environment.

reviews.author: deepti srivastava
reviews.review_body:
I am delighted to share my positive experiences with MRIS's exceptional educational environment, dedicated class teacher, and enriching cultural program."
"At MRIS's a commitment to fostering holistic development and academic excellence shines through its vibrant community and comprehensive educational approach.
The cultural program at MRIS offers a diverse array of activities that not only celebrate cultural diversity but also promote inclusivity, empathy, and understanding among students from various backgrounds."
Through the nurturing guidance of the school and teacher, students at MRIS have shown remarkable growth, both academically and socially, demonstrating increased confidence, creativity, and appreciation for cultural diversity."
MRIS has proven itself as a beacon of educational excellence, where students thrive under the guidance of dedicated teachers and through the enriching experiences provided by the school's cultural program. I look forward to witnessing the continued growth and success of this exceptional learning community."

reviews.author: Tarun K
reviews.review_body: One of the stupidest school in terms of management. DM ordered winter timings to start from 10am and school changed it to 9.40am. And after a month its suddenly changed to 8.15am for everyone including toddlers. How can they expect kids to adjust to sudden time change of 1.5 hours and on top of that to enforce discipline start closing gate sharply at 8.15am. This is very serious concern.This school has very arrogant management and treats kids as machine. So think twice before admitting in this school

reviews.author: anjali sharma
reviews.review_body: My son is studying in Manav Rachna International School from last 4 years. "An exceptional educational experience! The school provides a nurturing environment where students thrive academically and personally. The dedicated teachers goes above and beyond, fostering a love for learning through innovative teaching methods. The diverse extracurricular activities ensure a well-rounded education, promoting both character development and teamwork. Overall, it's a place where students not only gain knowledge but also build lasting friendships and cherished memories. Highly recommend!" My son took admission in 2020 in class 3rd and we moved back to India from Sweden that year. It was a tough time for us due to COVID and my son was not able to speak hindi a single word as his all primary education till 2nd class was in Sweden and he use to talk to us also in english. But i am so thankful to Manav Rachna International School as they did so hard work for my son. That time online classes where going on due to COVID and they provided alone hindi online classes for my son and they started from basic. Today my son is excelling in academic as well as extracurricular activities. Thankyou MANAV RACHNA INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL

reviews.author: Nitin Sharma
reviews.review_body: I’m constantly impressed with Manav Rachna International School. From the moment I stepped into this school, I felt a sense of belonging and a commitment to fostering individual growth. MRIS emphasis on values and character education instills a strong sense of integrity and responsibility in its students. The modern facilities and resources enhance the overall learning experience, creating an environment where students are inspired to reach their full potential. Choosing this school has truly been an investment in my child's future." As a parent, next to safety, education is my highest priority, and I can tell you that after being there for 3 years, I see clearly that education is at the core. Students are excelling, and if there is ever an area where a child is behind, it’s addressed immediately, and resources are engaged to help that child. The teachers have been phenomenal, so dedicated, and positive in the way they teach while holding kids to a standard of bothersome learning and citizenship.

reviews.author: Aradhana Chatterjee
reviews.review_body: Excellent school. It is really a playground of learning. Teachers are very understanding and having enough patience to deal with kids.  The entire team supports and provides a safe and pleasant environment for our little flowers to be ready in all perspectives to deal and compete the word with confidence and achieve the best they want.

reviews.author: Neerja Mediratta
reviews.review_body:
We are highly satisfied with MRIS, Noida.
Teachers definitely put in their best foot forward and that's the reason I think students of MRIS,Noida outperform themselves.
So, a big thankyou to all the teachers and staff for all the timely updates and taking such good care of children.

reviews.author: priyanka goyal
reviews.review_body: "I am delighted to have chosen Manav Rachna School for my daughter's education. What sets this school apart is the unwavering focus of the teachers on every child. With a class size that is not excessively high, the teachers can provide personalized attention, which I believe is very important nowadays. The classrooms are a true reflection of a vibrant learning environment—colorful and inviting, stepping into them instantly fills you with energy. Moreover, I appreciate the school's commitment to a well-rounded education, with a rich offering of extracurricular activities. I'm confident that my daughter is in the right place to not only excel academically but also thrive in a nurturing and stimulating atmosphere.

reviews.author: Nidhi Shukla
reviews.review_body: really really helpful staff and teachers.They always have a solution of the problem.The principal Ms.Nidiya Saket is always open to suggestions.
